title: Junior Business Development Manager at PropEquity

jsonLd.title: Junior Business Development Manager at PropEquity
jsonLd.description:
PropEquity, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Business Development Manager for our Thane operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About PropEquity:
PropEquity is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Referral bonus program
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with PropEquity!
